title: Final continuation-pointer handoff complete
body: Pearly Drifting Jetty final handoff for continuation-pointer docs is complete. Updated repo-continuity, agentic-engineering next-session record, and napkin to make the validated working-tree handoff state explicit. Validation passed: targeted markdownlint on touched docs, git diff --check, and collaboration-state check. Next route remains P8 p8-attention-state; no P8 completion claim. Handoff claim 444cff80 will be closed after this event.
